zh.lifeSummary: 當Jevan William於從大約1500年到1502年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根馬加姆時，他的父親Morgan ap William37歲，母親Katherine Cromwell25歲。他於1527年與Jevan Verch Gwilim在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1580年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jevan William于从大约1500年到1502年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根馬加姆时，他的父亲Morgan ap William37岁，母亲Katherine Cromwell25岁。他于1527年与Jevan Verch Gwilim在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1580年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Memoli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Ciro, Francesco, Luciano, Natale, Nino.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a pet form of thepersonal name Guglielmo, Italian form of William .

variants.name: McElligott
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brigid, Brendan, Seamus.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uileagóid, a patronymic from a pet form of the Gaelic form of the personal name William .

variants.name: McWilliam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scottish Iain, Morag.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uilleim, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of William , also Anglicized as Williamson in Scotland. The name is thought to be mainly Scottish in Ulster, though there has been some confusion with McQuillan in County Down. In Connacht, McWilliam was a branch of Burke .

variants.name: Wilcock
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Wilcoc, a pet form of William (composed of the elements Will 1 + the hypocoristic suffix -cok; see Cocke ).

variants.name: McWilliams
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uilleim, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of William , with excrescent English -s. In Ireland it sometimes represents a partial Gaelicization of Welsh Williams .

variants.name: Lemmo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Donato, Gino.
Italian (southern): from the personal name Lemmo, a pet form of Guglielmo, an equivalent of William . Compare Lembo .

variants.name: Wilk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Mariusz, Stanislaw, Tadeusz, Zygmunt, Andrzej, Bogdan, Boguslaw, Casimir, Krzysztof, Stanislawa, Boleslaw, Darek.

Polish: from the vocabulary word wilk ‘wolf’, probably applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble a wolf or connected with wolves in some way. Alternatively, from an Old Slavic personal name based on vlъkъ ‘wolf’.
English (Staffordshire): from Middle English Wilke, a pet form of William and probably a shortening of Wilkin . The usage was very likely Flemish in origin.

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.
North German: variant of   Wilken  .

variants.name: Gillam
meanings: English: variant of   Gilliam  .
Welsh: Anglicized form of   Gwilliam  .

variants.name: Lembo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Carmelo, Domenic, Pietro, Alfio, Amelio, Antonio, Biagio, Dante, Giovani, Giovanni.
Italian (southern): from a hypercorrected form of Lemmo, a pet form of Guglièlmo, an equivalent of William .

nameMeanings.name: Jevan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a nickname from Anglo-Norman French jovene ‘young’ (Latin iuvenis). Use as a given name has probably been influenced by its similarity in sound to Evan .

variants.name: Jeavon
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jevon .

variants.name: Jeevan
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jevon .

en.lifeSummary: When Jevan William was born from about 1500 to 1502, in Margam, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Morgan ap William, was 37 and his mother, Katherine Cromwell, was 25. He married Jevan Verch Gwilim in 1527, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1580, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jevan William est né du environ 1500 au 1502, à Margam, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Morgan ap William, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Katherine Cromwell, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jevan Verch Gwilim en 1527, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1580, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jevan William von um 1500 bis 1502 in Margam, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morgan ap William 37 und seine Mutter Katherine Cromwell 25. Er hat 1527 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Jevan Verch Gwilim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1580 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jevan William è nato il da circa 1500 a 1502 nel Margam, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Morgan ap William, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Cromwell, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jevan Verch Gwilim nel 1527, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1580, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Jevan Williamがから約1500年まで1502年にウェールズグラモーガンマルガムで生まれた時，父Morgan ap Williamは37歳，母Katherine Cromwellは25歳であった。1527年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでJevan Verch Gwilimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1580年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jevan William(이)가 대략 1500년 부터 1502년 까지 웨일스 글램르건 마감에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morgan ap William(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Cromwell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1527년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Jevan Verch Gwilim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1580년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jevan William nasceu de aproximadamente 1500 a 1502, em Margam, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Morgan ap William, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Cromwell, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jevan Verch Gwilim em 1527, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1580, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jevan William родился с около 1500 по 1502 в местности маргам, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Morgan ap William было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Cromwell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jevan Verch Gwilim в 1527 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1580 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jevan William nació desde aproximadamente 1500 hasta 1502, en Margam, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Morgan ap William, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Katherine Cromwell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jevan Verch Gwilim en 1527, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1580, en su pueblo.
